svg.title: Kubernetes DRA KEP architecture and April 2026 planning outlook
svg.desc: A DRA architecture map generated for the April 2026 DRA planning view, combining the control-plane capability layers, active 1.37 KEPs in kep.yaml, and open problem clusters derived from unresolved DRA issues as of 2026-04-27 Singapore time.
svg.text: Kubernetes DRA KEP architecture + April 2026 planning
Generated for the April 2026 DRA planning view · as of 2026-04-27 (SGT) · checked against kubernetes/enhancements master
Read top to bottom as publish/model -> request/schedule -> bind/prepare -> observe/operate.
v1.36 alpha; set semantics for topology
Open; text targets alpha in 1.37, beta
Open; proposal text calls out alpha
in 1.37 but no merged kep.yaml yet
external attach stays in the bind path
Open; proposal text calls out alpha
in 1.37 but not merged into kep.yaml
is where async device workflows converge
Pod status exposes allocated device health
Five DRA KEPs still target Kubernetes 1.37 in kep.yaml.
All 5 issues are OPEN; latest milestone is still v1.36.
No DRA issue with a v1.37 milestone was observed.
Open DRA issues: 34 total · v1.36 milestone 15 · no milestone 19
未来 DRA 核心问题（按未关闭 issue 归纳）
Open issues still cluster around sharing semantics, scheduling quality, and operations.
共享亲和、受限共享、容量预留和共享一致性语义仍未定型。
DRA 预抢占、跨节点/设备打分、兼容组选择还不完整。
每 Pod 的 slice 数、每 slice 资源数、informer 窗口和并发更新仍是瓶颈。
配额落在 admission 还是 allocation，以及显式/隐式 claim 如何统一计量。
Cluster 级模板、显式 DeviceClass 字段、可选 Node lifecycle 还在打磨。
设备健康状态标准化和资源可用性可视化仍缺统一模型。
CPU 位图对齐、device profile、互斥分配模型仍需更强抽象。
1.37 的 DRA 仍以补共享语义、调度质量和运维能力为主，
而不是出现新的 milestone 收敛或大批量新增已落地 KEP。
Source frame for this planning diagram: local DRA notes in this repo plus the 2026-04-27 SGT enhancements/master cross-check provided for KEP-4680, 5004, 5007, 5055, 5304 and related open DRA issues.
